caption: A man with dark skin is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, glasses, and a tall, gray, peaked wig. He wears black headphones over the wig and sits behind a black microphone. The background consists of framed pictures and a clothing rack with items from the brand "LEE." An on-screen logo on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and similar text appears on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. In the first frame, he is looking forward with his mouth open. In the second frame, he raises his left hand in a gesture. By the third and fourth frames, he looks slightly downward and brings both hands together in front of his chest as he continues to speak.
